task1.title: The site of a farm in 1950 and the same site today
task1.instruction: The plans below show the site of a farm in 1950 and the same site today. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Some school leavers go travelling or work for a period of time instead of going directly to university. Do you think this has more advantages or disadvantages for their study?
